title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cisco India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cisco India
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India:
Cisco India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India!
